stopConditions: Do not expand generic examples or platform-internal model mentions into separate availability claims.

methodsAttempted.query: QS 81-90 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and site maps were used across QS81-90. Tool-level evidence was found for Penn State, Leeds, Boston University, and Purdue.

artifacts.summary: QS81-90 AI tools discovery found official tool-level records for Pennsylvania State University, University of Leeds, Boston University, and Purdue University.

artifacts.title: uapt-ai-tools-qs-81-90-20260712 AI tools extraction
artifacts.summary: Validated QS81-90 AI tools extraction with official tool-level records for Penn State, Leeds, Boston University, and Purdue.
limitations: This tracker summarizes source-backed public evidence and is not legal, academic-integrity, or procurement advice.
Generic AI examples and platform-internal model mentions were not expanded into separate tool availability records.

artifacts.claimText: AI Studio is listed for Pennsylvania State University in an official university AI tools source. Derived availability: conditionally allowed. Derived endorsement type: self hosted system.
artifacts.normalizedValue: {"tool":"self_deploy","rawToolName":"AI Studio","description":"Penn State enterprise generative AI platform with access to multiple models through AI Studio's ONEchat interface.","howToObtain":"Log in to AI Studio.","costToUser":"Not specified.","availability":"conditionally_allowed","endorsementType":"self_hosted_system"}

AI Studio - AI at Penn State
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: AI Studio is Penn State's enterprise generative AI platform that provides access to leading AI models in one place. AI Studio is available to employees and all students enrolled in summer classes.
